Description.value: Quest Revamp companion. Replaces the FNS 'all tier* = 10 choices' flatlining with a per-tier scaling so harder difficulty tiers feel meaningfully more luxurious: regular tier1=3 to tier6=8, super = +2, ultra/nightmare = +3. Adds tier1_clear_superinfested for the dull tier1 vanilla loop, rebalances ultrainfested spawn/GS toward a 'choosable hard quest' band, and doubles the trader rotation weight of super entries. Each tier-difficulty cell gets value-scaled weapon/armor/tool/resource lanes, with groupCraftingRare at tier4+ super/ultra/nightmare and a fixed resourceLegendaryParts on tier6 super/ultra/nightmare. v0.5: pure ammo reward lane shrunk to value=1 on super/ultra/nightmare so it stops being the default choice and lets weapon/armor/tool/crafting lanes win the choices gacha. Pure XML, loads after Quest Revamp-Gears Edition and FNS Make Quest Rewards Great Again.
